checklist.criterion: No agent-specific tool names (e.g. amp, cursor, copilot) appear in generated skill content
Agent-neutral phrasing used throughout (e.g. 'the agent', 'the assistant', not a named tool)
Audit output paths (.context/audits/, .context/plans/, .context/analysis/) explicitly excluded from git commits
User reminded that audit artefacts are ephemeral and should not be committed
